name: dot-skill
description: Open .skill Protocol — portable, verifiable AI skill packages (continuity + release).

scripts.build: npm run build -w @dot-skill/protocol && npm run build -w @dot-skill/core && npm run build -w @dot-skill/runtime && npm run build -w @dot-skill/registry && npm run build -w @dot-skill/workspace && npm run build -w @dot-skill/cli
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test -w @dot-skill/cli
scripts.test:examples: SKILL_HOST=example-agent node packages/cli/dist/cli.js pack examples/knowledge-only/recipe.json --approve --profile continuity -o /tmp/dot-skill-knowledge.skill && SKILL_HOST=example-agent node packages/cli/dist/cli.js pack examples/parameterized-integration/recipe.json --approve --profile release -o /tmp/dot-skill-integration.skill && SKILL_HOST=example-agent node packages/cli/dist/cli.js pack examples/code-changing/recipe.json --approve --profile release -o /tmp/dot-skill-code.skill
